education.thesis: AI for Medical Imaging: Ophthalmology and Robotic Surgery

education.institution: University of Applied Sciences Bern, Switzerland

experience.description: Leading the ML team in Aubonne, Switzerland. Mentoring Senior and Machine Learning Engineers. DRI for stereo matching algorithms in the da Vinci robot.
Developed and deployed machine learning models for surgical robotics.
Worked on computer vision and stereo matching for surgical robots. Focused on 3D reconstruction, real-time inference, and edge computing.

experience.company: AI in Medical Imaging Laboratory, ARTORG Center, University of Bern
experience.description: Conducted research in AI for medical imaging with focus on ophthalmology and robotic minimally invasive surgery. Published 6 first-author papers in top-tier venues (MICCAI, Nature Scientific Reports, IJCARS). Developed deep learning methods for surgical instrument recognition, pose estimation, and segmentation. Built and maintained the HPC GPU cluster for the ARTORG Center. Supervised by Prof. Dr. Raphael Sznitman. Received Prix Retina (2020) and MICCAI Young Scientist Award (2019).

experience.company: Ophthalmic Technology Laboratory, ARTORG Center, University of Bern
experience.description: Developed ophthalmic technology solutions and diagnostic tools.

Developed enterprise Java applications (Java EE/Spring Boot) with scalable architecture design. Implemented RESTful APIs, database integration, and web-based visualization solutions. Mentored junior developers.
